# OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.unsigned(_:)

**Case**

An unsigned 64-bit integer returned by the OSLog API that corresponds to the argument.

## Declaration

```swift
case unsigned(UInt64)
```

## Constants

- **OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.data(_:)**: A data object returned by the [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog] API that corresponds to the argument.
- **OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.double(_:)**: A double returned by the [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog] API that corresponds to the argument.
- **OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.signed(_:)**: A signed 64-bit integer returned by the [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog] API that corresponds to the argument.
- **OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.string(_:)**: A string returned by the [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog] API that corresponds to the argument.
- **OSLogMessageComponent.Argument.undefined**: A undefined object returned by the OSLog API that corresponds to the argument.
